word: H4101 - מָה - mâh - maw - How great

sections.paragraph:
Original: מה

Transliteration: mâh

Phonetic: maw

BDB Definition:

  1. what, whatever
    1. what?
    2. whatever, what, whatsoever
    3. how?, why?, wherefore? (with prefixes)

Origin: corresponding to H4100

TWOT entry: 2822

Part(s) of speech:
